question: What is the relation between the plate of salad and the bowl of sweet potatoes in the image? Select from the following options: (A) The bowl of sweet potatoes is on the plate of salad. (B) The plate of salad is on the bowl of sweet potatoes. (C) They are not visible in the image. (D) They are placed next to each other.
gold_answer: They are placed next to each other
answer_choices: The bowl of sweet potatoes is on the plate of salad
The plate of salad is on the bowl of sweet potatoes
They are not visible in the image
They are placed next to each other

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A plate of salad directly stacked on top of a bowl of sweet potatoes
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: Two separate dishes placed side by side with space between them
